overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person perspective of a character sitting on a city bench smoking and observing futuristic urban street life, then standing up and walking along the sidewalk. The scene features dense pedestrian traffic, futuristic vehicles, and neon-lit buildings in Night City during a bright sunny day.

agents.ego_description: sitting on a concrete ledge smoking a cigarette and observing street activity

notable_agents.action: companion with mohawk and leather jacket sitting beside player, also smoking

entered.detail: green-trimmed covered transit shelter with digital displays
tall building with large pink neon signage reading 'WATSON'
cluster of modern glass and steel high-rise buildings
futuristic red and silver cars parked along the curb
mature trees with green foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player sits on a concrete ledge under a transit shelter in a futuristic downtown area, smoking and observing the street. A companion with a mohawk sits nearby. Futuristic vehicles move along the multi-lane road while pedestrians walk past, and neon-lit skyscrapers rise in the background under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with pedestrian traffic

events.description: character raises holographic device to take a photo of the street

agents.ego_description: using a holographic handheld device to capture images while seated

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in distinctive red pants walking close past the camera

entered.detail: futuristic transparent handheld device emitting blue light and displaying images

segments.scene_description: While remaining seated, the player interacts with a holographic device to take photos of the bustling street. Pedestrians continue to flow past in both directions, including a person in red pants walking close by. The transit shelter and neon-lit buildings remain visible in the background as traffic moves steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with moving traffic and pedestrians

events.description: character stands up from the ledge and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk through pedestrian traffic

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the sidewalk
futuristic yellow taxi cab driving along the street

segments.scene_description: The player stands up and walks forward along the sidewalk, leaving the transit shelter behind. The camera moves through moderate pedestrian traffic past a metal street railing, with futuristic vehicles including a yellow taxi visible on the road. The perspective shifts to show more of the open street and crosswalk area as the character progresses through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that transitions from a moment of stationary observation to an active walk through a bustling futuristic metropolis. It begins with the camera seated on a concrete ledge under a transit shelter, observing a companion with a mohawk and the flow of neon-lit skyscrapers and traffic under a bright midday sun. As the character interacts with a holographic device to photograph the street, the view remains fixed on the passing pedestrians, including a person in red pants. The scene then shifts as the character stands up and moves forward, leaving the shelter behind to navigate through moderate pedestrian traffic. Finally, the camera glides past a metal street railing and a yellow taxi, opening up to reveal a wider view of the urban crosswalk and the expansive city environment.
